mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS < 0.5%, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction with accuracy > 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and capital expenditure strength, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth drives positive short-term equity returns only during periods of stable inflation, as supply-side expansion boosts corporate earnings without triggering monetary tightening.
failure_condition: The signal predicts positive returns during high inflation periods (>3% CPI YoY) with accuracy below 50%, or loses predictive power when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth directly increases corporate revenue expectations and equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >55% of observations following GDP prints above 2.5% annualized, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index annual growth surpassing 2.8% triggers expectations of aggressive Federal Reserve tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally in >60% of instances when inflation crosses the threshold, or the signal shows no directional edge in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with a declining federal funds rate creates a goldilocks environment of expanding earnings and falling discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction effect vanishes when either series is lagged by one month.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month decline in retail sales exceeding 1.5% signals immediate consumer demand destruction, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week as earnings forecasts are downgraded.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >55% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to achieve a Sharpe ratio above 0.5 in out-of-sample trading simulations.
